summary: Project with known deployment size issues; applying fixes one at a time. Currently working on Task 4: Restore RB Order Logic (from Draft 175). Pending tasks: Master Design → Karigar Sync, Karigar Export PDF, Desktop Sidebar Layout Fix.
architectural_notes: Project is large/complex; applying fixes one at a time to avoid hitting max_tool_iterations budget limit during deployment.
known_issues: Deploying multiple tasks at once causes build failures due to max_tool_iterations budget exceeded.

new_feature_requests.summary: Restore the RB (Return/Replenishment Buy) order logic so that RB-type orders are correctly handled throughout the order lifecycle: they must be distinguishable from CO-type orders, display correctly in the TotalOrdersTab grouped view, support the SuppliedQtyDialog partial-supply flow (remaining units stay as Pending), and transition through status stages (Pending → Ready → Hallmark → ReturnFromHallmark) without regression.
